message:
Add project-level hook install and --no-configure update flag

- install --project: writes the DCG hook to .claude/settings.json in the
  current repo root instead of the user-level ~/.claude/settings.json,
  supporting per-project hook management.

- update --no-configure (alias --binary-only): updates only the DCG
  binary, skipping hook registration and shell RC modifications. Useful
  when hooks are managed at the project level and should not be
  re-injected into user settings on every update.

- Wire project_claude_settings_path() to resolve .claude/settings.json
  relative to the git repo root.

- Pass the new `project` flag through install_hook, setup, and doctor
  code paths.

- Add CLI parse tests for --no-configure, --binary-only, --project, and
  --force --project combinations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
